spec.name: The Firedeath
spec.description: This room is very hot. There are flames surrounding you. You can see no exits at all! Skeletons are lying all over the floor.

extra_descs.description: The skeletons looks like they had suffered the death of hunger. One of them looks like he has written something at the wall.
The writing says 'A prayer to the GODS will not be heard, though the only exit is death... Mother, I love you'.
